delta.description: with_skill 100% vs without_skill 44.4% — largest delta of all 5 skills. Baseline lacks: pillar-cluster model, TOFU/MOFU/BOFU percentages, quick-wins with expected results, JTBD framework, editorial calendar table.

analyst_notes: content-strategist-saas-launch: Baseline scored 2/5 — missed pillar-cluster, TOFU/MOFU/BOFU distribution, and quick-wins. These require specific frameworks baseline doesn't apply by default.
content-strategist-content-audit: Baseline scored 2/4 — missed editorial-calendar-table and JTBD framework. It used different (but valid) classification categories, so audit-classification passed.
The JTBD assertion is the strongest discriminator: baseline never applied it; skill always did.
Pillar-cluster architecture is equally discriminating: baseline tends to organize by month/topic, not by pillar+cluster model.
content-strategist has the highest delta of all skills — indicates genuine expertise injection beyond baseline Claude behavior.
